pages.raw_text:
Monday will usher in the great
est Interstate fair ever held In
Spokane. BY noon 1t Is expected
every exhibit win be in place and
the fair will be complete by after
noon. The program Is replete with
excellent attractions, the one de-
plorable feature being the disgust
ing criminal exhibition to be put
on by Harry Draper and Dick Gem
rigg, with their bloodhounds.


Industrial, agricultural and min
ing exhibits are the most complete
and valuable ever offered for In
terstate exposition.


Monday Is the day set aside for
the 1901 900 club. 1t is their day to
do as they please with, and from
indications members of the club
will have a time that long will be
a memory. The Enakops will open
the night show with grand car
nival and mardi gras parade before
the grandstand. Members will as
semble at S:13 o'clock and get in
line in full regalia. There will be
almost mile of floats, freak feat
ures, bands and secret orders and
they will pass before the grand
stand twice in review.


The parade will be headed by
Queen Edna and her court escorted
by a guard of 20 men behind which
will come the float Of the prime
